principle: Ask open-ended discovery questions not leading validation questions — leading questions confirm your assumptions and corrupt the data
explanation: X.research|confirmation_bias: invested_designer -> favors_confirming_feedback -> skewed_output; prevention: ask_discovery_NOT_validation; run_research_early_before_emotional_investment; multiple_data_sources + neutral_observer; NO:leading_questions_with_answer_embedded; eg: "Do you think this red button is helpful to proceed?" >> "What would you do to proceed from here?"

principle: Survey only users who have completed the action you are researching — asking non-buyers about checkout is selection bias that invalidates findings
explanation: X.research|selection_bias: wrong_sample -> misleading_data -> wrong_design_decision; match_sample_to_research_goal: payment_flow -> ask_users_who_initiated_payment NOT never-buyers; rule: right_question + right_audience + right_context = valid_data; NO:survey_all_users_for_feature_specific_feedback NO:rushed_survey_with_incentive_skewing_sample; eg: "payment_survey_sent_to_all_users" >> "payment_survey_sent_to_users_who_started_checkout"
